description: Web app recreating the Tektronix vector graphics terminal experience with drawing tools and gallery

userStories.title: Project scaffolding and file structure
userStories.description: Set up the basic project structure with HTML entry points, CSS, and JS directories.
acceptanceCriteria: Create index.html with basic HTML5 boilerplate and canvas element
Create gallery.html with basic HTML5 boilerplate
Create css/style.css with CSS reset and color variables from PRD
Create empty js/ directory structure: js/canvas/, js/tools/, js/gallery/, js/utils/
Create js/utils/colors.js exporting the color palette constants
Both HTML files load style.css and have dark background

userStories.title: TekCanvas dual-layer canvas setup
userStories.description: Create the dual-canvas system with HiDPI support and resize handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Implements dual canvas: persistent layer + animation layer

userStories.title: VectorRenderer for drawing primitives
userStories.description: Create rendering utilities for crisp vector drawing.
acceptanceCriteria: Methods: drawLine(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color), drawCircle(ctx, cx, cy, r, color, filled), drawRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, color, filled), drawArc(ctx, cx, cy, r, startAngle, endAngle, color)
All coordinates in normalized 0-1 space, converted at draw time

userStories.title: PlotAnimator animation queue
userStories.description: Create the animation engine that draws lines progressively.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts TekCanvas and VectorRenderer in constructor
queue(command) - adds draw command to FIFO queue
Commands: {type: 'line', x1, y1, x2, y2}, {type: 'circle', cx, cy, radius}, etc.
Animates lines from start to end based on speed (px/sec)

userStories.title: Test animation with manual commands
userStories.description: Wire up basic test to verify animation system works.
acceptanceCriteria: Create js/app.js that initializes TekCanvas, VectorRenderer, PlotAnimator
On page load, queue several test lines that form a simple shape (triangle or square)
Lines animate visibly at default speed (800 px/sec)
Opening index.html in browser shows animated drawing

userStories.title: BaseTool abstract class
userStories.description: Create the base class that all drawing tools extend.
acceptanceCriteria: Abstract methods: onMouseDown(x,y), onMouseMove(x,y), onMouseUp(x,y), onKeyDown(key)
Handles preview rendering on animation canvas

userStories.title: ToolManager with undo/redo
userStories.description: Create the tool manager that handles tool switching and command history.
acceptanceCriteria: addCommand(cmd) - adds to history and queues for animation
undo() - removes last command, redraws canvas

userStories.title: LineTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the line drawing tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Click sets start point, drag shows preview line, release creates line
Preview line renders on animation canvas (cleared each frame)
On release, emits command: {type: 'line', x1, y1, x2, y2}
Test: can draw lines in browser

userStories.title: RectTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the rectangle drawing tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Click sets corner, drag to opposite corner, release creates rect
Preview rectangle on animation canvas while dragging
Emits command: {type: 'rect', x, y, width, height, filled: false}
Test: can draw rectangles in browser

userStories.title: CircleTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the circle drawing tool with bounding box interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Click sets bounding box corner, drag to opposite corner
Circle inscribed in bounding box (center at box center, radius = min(w,h)/2)
Preview circle on animation canvas while dragging
Emits command: {type: 'circle', cx, cy, radius, filled: false}
Test: can draw circles in browser

userStories.title: ArcTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the arc drawing tool with multi-step interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1: Click and drag to set center and radius
Step 2: Move to set start angle, click to confirm
Step 3: Move to set end angle, click to complete
Preview arc updates during each step
Emits command: {type: 'arc', cx, cy, radius, startAngle, endAngle}

userStories.title: Hershey vector font data
userStories.description: Create stroke-based vector font for text rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Export HERSHEY_FONT object mapping characters to stroke arrays
Coordinates normalized to character height of 1

userStories.title: TextTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the text drawing tool using vector font.
acceptanceCriteria: Click to place text cursor (shows blinking cursor)
Type characters, they render immediately as vector strokes
Enter or Escape confirms text placement
Emits command: {type: 'text', x, y, text, scale}

userStories.title: FillTool with pattern fills
userStories.description: Create the pattern fill tool.
acceptanceCriteria: Click inside a closed region to fill with pattern
Patterns: crosshatch, horizontal, vertical, diagonal45, diagonal135, dots
Uses flood-fill algorithm to find boundary
Emits command: {type: 'fill', x, y, pattern, boundaryCommands}
Pattern rendered as lines within boundary

userStories.title: EraserTool implementation
userStories.description: Create the eraser tool that removes elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Click on a drawn element to erase it
Uses hit-testing to find nearest command within threshold
Removes command from history and redraws canvas

userStories.title: Complete CSS styling
userStories.description: Finish the dark theme CSS with all UI components.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark theme using color palette from PRD
Toolbar styles: 48px wide, icon buttons with hover states
Status bar styles: 32px tall, monospace font
Tool options panel styles (slide-out from toolbar)
Button styles, slider styles, checkbox styles

userStories.title: Complete index.html layout
userStories.description: Build the full UI layout for the drawing page.
acceptanceCriteria: Update index.html with full layout per PRD wireframe
Header with title and minimal controls
Left toolbar with tool buttons (L, R, C, A, T, F, E icons)
Status bar with speed slider, grid toggle, position display

userStories.title: Wire up app.js with tool switching
userStories.description: Connect all tools to UI buttons and keyboard shortcuts.
acceptanceCriteria: Update js/app.js to initialize all components
Tool buttons click handlers - switch active tool
Keyboard shortcuts: L=Line, R=Rect, C=Circle, A=Arc, T=Text, F=Fill, E=Eraser

userStories.title: Tool options panels
userStories.description: Add per-tool options that appear when tool is selected.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slide-out panel that shows when tool selected
LineTool: line style dropdown (solid, dashed, dotted)

userStories.title: Grid toggle and position display
userStories.description: Implement the optional background grid and cursor position.
acceptanceCriteria: Grid toggle button in status bar
Position display shows cursor X,Y in pixels

userStories.title: Speed slider control
userStories.description: Implement the animation speed control.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 stops: Slowest (100), Slow (300), Normal (800), Fast (2000), Instant

userStories.title: localStorage auto-save
userStories.description: Auto-save drawing to localStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: loadFromLocalStorage() - returns command array or null
Auto-load on page load, replay commands
Clear storage when user explicitly clears canvas

userStories.title: File save/load (JSON)
userStories.description: Save and load drawings as .tek.json files.
acceptanceCriteria: loadFromFile() - opens file picker, parses JSON, returns commands
File format per PRD: {version, created, modified, canvasAspect, commands}
Wire up Save/Open buttons in toolbar
Shows error toast if file invalid

userStories.title: PNG export
userStories.description: Export drawing as PNG image.
acceptanceCriteria: exportPNG(canvas, options) - returns blob or triggers download
Wire up Export button (or submenu with PNG/SVG choice)

userStories.title: SVG export
userStories.description: Export drawing as SVG vector file.
acceptanceCriteria: exportSVG(commands, width, height) - returns SVG string or triggers download
Converts commands to SVG elements (line, circle, path, text)
Opens correctly in browser and Inkscape

userStories.title: Geometric gallery demos
userStories.description: Create the geometric pattern demo graphics.
acceptanceCriteria: Spirograph generator with R, r, d params
Lissajous curve generator with a, b, delta params
Rose curve (rhodonea) generator with n, d params
Each as generator function yielding draw commands
Export array of demo objects with id, name, category, params, generate()

userStories.title: 3D wireframe gallery demos
userStories.description: Create 3D wireframe demo graphics.
acceptanceCriteria: Each as generator function yielding line commands

userStories.title: Data visualization gallery demos
userStories.description: Create chart and graph demo graphics.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar chart with animated bars growing
Pie chart with segments drawing in
Sample data embedded in each demo

userStories.title: Maps and astronomy gallery demos
userStories.description: Create map and space demo graphics.
acceptanceCriteria: Earth globe (wireframe sphere with continent hints)

userStories.title: Technical gallery demos
userStories.description: Create technical/engineering demo graphics.

userStories.title: GalleryManager for loading demos
userStories.description: Create the gallery manager that loads and categorizes demos.
acceptanceCriteria: getAllDemos() - returns flat array of all demos
generateThumbnail(demo) - renders small preview to canvas

userStories.title: GraphicPlayer for demo playback
userStories.description: Create the player component for watching demos.
acceptanceCriteria: Takes demo object and canvas element
Parameter sliders update and restart demo

userStories.title: Gallery page HTML and CSS
userStories.description: Build the gallery page layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Header with title and link back to canvas
Player view (replaces grid when demo selected)
Player controls: play/pause, restart, speed, params
Back button to return to grid

userStories.title: Gallery app.js wiring
userStories.description: Wire up the gallery page functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: URL updates with demo ID (allows direct linking)

userStories.title: Open in Editor feature
userStories.description: Allow opening gallery demos in the drawing canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Open in Editor' button to player view
Generates all commands from demo (instant, no animation)
User can edit/extend the demo drawing

userStories.title: Dockerfile and docker-compose
userStories.description: Create Docker deployment configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose up builds and serves site

userStories.title: README documentation
userStories.description: Create project README with setup and usage.

userStories.title: Final polish and cleanup
userStories.description: Final review and polish pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Test all gallery demos play correctly
Verify responsive layout at various sizes
